def transform4(grid):
    rows=len(grid); cols=len(grid[0])
    newgrid=[row[:] for row in grid]
    # clear original 4s
    for r,c in blocks(grid):
        for dr in [0,1]:
            for dc in [0,1]:
                newgrid[r+dr][c+dc]=0
    # precompute side presence per original row
    left_exists=[False]*rows
    right_exists=[False]*rows
    for r,c in blocks(grid):
        if c<10:
            left_exists[r]=True
        else:
            right_exists[r]=True
    # process blocks right-to-left
    for r,c in sorted(blocks(grid), key=lambda x:-x[1]):
        dest=c
        if c<10 and not right_exists[r]:
            target=c+11
        elif c>10 and not left_exists[r]:
            target=c-11
        else:
            target=None
        def can_place(r0,c0):
            if c0 is None or c0<0 or c0+1>=cols: return False
            for dr in [0,1]:
                for dc in [0,1]:
                    if newgrid[r0+dr][c0+dc]!=0: return False
            return True
        if can_place(r,target):
            dest=target
            # update side presence arrays as we move
        for dr in [0,1]:
            for dc in [0,1]:
                newgrid[r+dr][dest+dc]=4
    return newgrid
